desc: In the real dequal deep-equal library (src/index.js), the plain-object branch uses `Object.keys(bar).length >= len` for its final key-count check, so an object with EXTRA keys is wrongly reported equal — dequal({a:1}, {a:1,b:2}) returns true instead of false. Fix the single comparison operator on that return line so that tests/dequal.test.ts passes.
